message:
test: Add E2E tests for Help Center and Support

Implements comprehensive E2E test coverage for:
- Help center main page, categories, and articles
- Contact form display, validation, and submission
- Support tickets page, lookup, and replies
- Fixes syntax error in settings/tickets/page.tsx

Files created:
- e2e/lib/support-helpers.ts (test utilities)
- e2e/web/support/help-center.spec.ts
- e2e/web/support/contact-form.spec.ts
- e2e/web/support/tickets.spec.ts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
